data.html:
@charset "UTF-8";
@layer reset, base, app.base;
.b-30Va_root{margin-inline:auto;padding-top:128px;padding-bottom:128px}@media (max-width:768px){.b-30Va_root{padding-top:48px;padding-bottom:96px}}@media (max-width:640px){.b-30Va_root{padding-top:0;padding-bottom:0}.b-30Va_rootHomepage{flex-direction:column-reverse;display:flex}}.b-30Va_illustration{max-width:var(--homepage-max-width);width:100%;position:relative}.b-30Va_actionWrapper{margin-top:48px}@media (max-width:1024px){.b-30Va_actionWrapper{margin-top:24px}}.b-30Va_action{transition:filter .16s var(--ease-out-quad), transform .16s var(--ease-out-quad);display:inline-block}@media (any-hover:hover){.b-30Va_action:hover{filter:brightness(1.4)}}.b-30Va_action:active{transform:scale(.97)}.b-30Va_header{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;align-items:start;padding-bottom:96px;display:grid}@media (max-width:1024px){.b-30Va_header{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding-bottom:64px}}@media (max-width:640px){.b-30Va_header{padding-top:40px;padding-bottom:48px}}.b-30Va_titleContainer{padding-right:32px}@supports (text-box:trim-both cap alphabetic){.b-30Va_title{text-box:trim-both cap alphabetic}}.b-30Va_descriptionContainer{padding-right:var(--homepage-padding-inset);padding-left:var(--homepage-padding-inset)}@media (max-width:1024px){.b-30Va_descriptionContainer{margin-top:24px}}.b-30Va_illustrationWrapper{padding-left:var(--homepage-outer-padding);padding-right:var(--homepage-outer-padding);justify-content:center;display:flex}.b-30Va_descriptionText{color:var(--color-text-secondary);max-width:38ch}@supports (text-box:trim-both cap alphabetic){.b-30Va_descriptionText{text-box:trim-both cap alphabetic}}@media (max-width:640px){.b-30Va_descriptionText{color:var(--color-text-tertiary)}}.b-30Va_footer{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;display:grid}@media (max-width:1024px){.b-30Va_footer{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.b-30Va_footerContent{grid-column:2}@media (max-width:1024px){.b-30Va_footerContent{grid-column:1}}.b-30Va_footerContentWide{grid-column:1/-1}
